name: Phil Collins
abstract: Philip David Charles Collins (born 30 January 1951) is an English singer, drummer, songwriter, record producer, and actor. He is best known as the drummer and later lead vocalist of the rock band Genesis, and for his highly successful career as a solo artist.

concerts.label: Phil Collins Big Band
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works_created.t: Tarzan: You'll be in my heart

about_quotes.evidence: guys would tell me, “Man what are you going on tour with Phil Collins?” ... And Phil [Collins] also.

about_quotes.speaker: Butch Miles
about_quotes.evidence: Most folks remember it from Phil Collins and a couple of the albums he did because he always did double stops on it.

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Hey
about_quotes.evidence: Phil Collins, who played first in Cleveland — I mean Cincinnati for a long time, a really great player
